title: Broaden PMC-OA literature extraction coverage (license-checked)
context: Broadening PMC-OA extraction is the highest-license-risk work: each article passes the per-article license gate and only structured facts are extracted. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Broaden license-checked PMC-OA literature extraction coverage, enforcing the per-article license gate and emitting structured facts with passage-level citations only.
acceptanceCriteria: Each article passes the per-article license gate before it is read.
Output is structured facts with passage-level citations — no verbatim redistribution of copyrighted text.
Uncertain extractions are flagged for human review, not asserted.
output: An expanded license-checked PMC-OA extracted-facts dataset, committed via PR.
